name: Valkyr prime
description: Valkyr Prime was once a paragon of Orokin honor, a proud warrior of the high courts. However, the echoes of her "future" self—the tortured version experimented on by Alad V—bleed through time and Transference. She is a creature of gold and ivory filigree, but beneath the regal armor lies a soul that has been flayed open. She is the only Warframe whose power is fueled entirely by her own suffering and rage.
creator: Alkador1
